name: Caniglo Essential Fatty Acids Supplement for Dogs - 200mL
description: CANIGLO is rich in the Essential Fatty Acids Omega 3 and 6 sourced from marine oils. These cannot be made by the body and must be provided through diet. An adequate intake of Essential Fatty Acids supports a healthy, soft shiny coat and good skin condition. Your dog will feel good inside and look fantastic outside! ADMINISTRATION: Mix Caniglo well into your dog's food. Feed each dog individually. Small Dogs ( up to 10kgs ): 4 mL Medium Dogs ( 10-25kgs ): 6 mL Large Dogs ( 25-40kgs ):8 mL Very Large Dogs ( over 40kgs): 12 mL
